input.background: Let $X$ represent a random variable of service time at a certain facility, and suppose that the cumulative distribution function of $X$ is given as $F(x)= \begin{cases}1-e^{-\lambda x}-\lambda x e^{-\lambda x} & \text { for } x>0 \\ 0 & \text { for } x \leq 0\end{cases}$ where $\lambda>0$. A random sample of 10 customers yielded data: $x_1=12$, $x_2=18$, $x_3=8$, $x_4=15$, $x_5=11$, $x_6=9$, $x_7=8$, $x_8=10$, $x_9=18$, $x_{10}=21$.
input.question: Obtain the maximum likelihood estimator of $\lambda$, and then compute the estimate for the given data.
